meta.source: Reifegradverfahren (TSO connection availability) × SEFE fibre × PeeringDB exchanges × OSM data centres

properties.name: Hamburg/Nord (NOR)
properties.tso_note: Hamburg ring reinforcement; 3 bays and 700 MW kept free — city load growth expected.
properties.why: 380 kV 50Hertz substation — bays: 3 free, availability year n/a. Fibre backbone 0 km, nearest IX DE-CIX Hamburg 22 km, Frankfurt 414 km, nearest large DC (Equinix) 11 km.

properties.name: Esch
properties.tso_note: Rhineland lignite district: Niederaußem/Neurath retirements free bays and headroom at the Cologne ring; NEP keeps Esch a major node.
properties.why: 380 kV Amprion substation — bays: n-1, connectable from 2032. Fibre backbone 1 km, nearest IX DE-CIX Dusseldorf 19 km, Frankfurt 166 km, nearest large DC (Digital Reality DUS2) 19 km.

properties.name: Ragow (RAG)
properties.tso_note: Lusatia node next to the former Lübbenau plant site; lignite exit frees bays.
properties.why: 380 kV 50Hertz substation — bays: 4 free, availability year n/a. Fibre backbone 1 km, nearest IX BCIX 77 km, Frankfurt 418 km, nearest large DC (Vantage Berlin II (BER2)) 49 km.

properties.name: Meppen
properties.tso_note: Emsland/NL-border corridor is feed-in-saturated; load here is grid-serving (absorbs northern wind surplus), so bays are earmarked for consumers only.
properties.why: 380 kV Amprion substation — bays: n-1, connectable from 2032; restriction: Load connections only. Fibre backbone 8 km, nearest IX BREM-IX 107 km, Frankfurt 301 km, nearest large DC (Equinix DU1) 167 km.

properties.name: Neuenhagen (NHG)
properties.tso_note: Berlin ring node (110 kV listing); 4 bays with modest available capacity.
properties.why: 110 kV 50Hertz substation — bays: 4 free, availability year n/a. Fibre backbone 16 km, nearest IX BCIX 24 km, Frankfurt 444 km, nearest large DC (Rechenzentrum BER01) 28 km.

properties.name: Clusorth
properties.tso_note: Same Emsland logic as Meppen: wind-saturated corridor — only load connections reduce congestion, hence load-only from 2035.
properties.why: 380 kV Amprion substation — bays: n-1, connectable from 2035; restriction: Load connections only. Fibre backbone 6 km, nearest IX Ruhr-CIX 112 km, Frankfurt 286 km, nearest large DC (Equinix DU1) 151 km.

properties.name: Daxlanden
properties.tso_note: RDK power-plant site Karlsruhe: 0 MW feed-in (already used), but 0.5–1 GW load headroom from 2035.
properties.why: 380 kV TransnetBW substation — bays: n-1, connectable from 2035; restriction: No feed-in capacity. Fibre backbone 5 km, nearest IX KA-NIX 7 km, Frankfurt 127 km, nearest large DC (Rechenzentrum Ellhofen) 73 km.

properties.name: Philippsburg
properties.tso_note: Nuclear site (KKP off 2011/2019): the plant's bays and strong lines remain, and the Ultranet HVDC converter makes it a premium node — capacity from 2032.
properties.why: 380 kV TransnetBW substation — bays: n-1, connectable from 2032. Fibre backbone 8 km, nearest IX KA-NIX 26 km, Frankfurt 97 km, nearest large DC (Rechenzentrum Ellhofen) 64 km.

properties.name: Mannheim
properties.tso_note: GKM hard-coal retirement frees capacity; TSO explicitly bars BESS here ("keine BESS") — plausibly short-circuit-power and stability duties of the node, reason not published.
properties.why: 380 kV TransnetBW substation — bays: n-1, connectable from 2032; restriction: No battery storage (keine BESS). Fibre backbone 2 km, nearest IX KA-NIX 50 km, Frankfurt 73 km, nearest large DC (Vantage Data Center FRA22) 61 km.

properties.name: Göhl West
properties.tso_note: Ostholstein endpoint of the new Ostküstenleitung; wind-saturated coast → load-only offer.
